import React from "react"; import Navbar from "./Navbar"; import ProductCard from "./ProductCard"; export default function HomePage({ pageClass, showPage, mobileOpen, setMobileOpen, wishlist, cartQuantity, isLoggedIn, products, filterAndShowCatalog, addToCart, toggleWishlist, showProduct }) { return (
setMobileOpen(prev => !prev)} />
